mapper.delete: delete from kb_thumbs_up where comment_id =#{commentId} and basic_id = #{basicId} and user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select:
SELECT t.* FROM kb_thumbs_up t WHERE 1 = 1
AND t.id like concat('%',#{kbThumbsUpEntity.id},'%')
AND t.comment_id like concat('%',#{kbThumbsUpEntity.commentId},'%')
AND t.status like concat('%',#{kbThumbsUpEntity.status},'%')
AND t.basic_id like concat('%',#{kbThumbsUpEntity.basicId},'%')
AND t.user_id like concat('%',#{kbThumbsUpEntity.userId},'%')
limit #{map.offset},#{map.rows}
select * from kb_thumbs_up where comment_id =#{commentId} and basic_id = #{basicId} and user_id = #{userId}
